description: The TouchToggle component acts as a button that works as a check box, and the different Toggle on and off action can be mapped to certain Touch events.

fields.State: The checkbox state of this touch toggle.
fields.EventType: the type of touch event to listen for different event states from.
fields.ToggleEvent: The event state needed when touching to Toggle the ``State`` value.
fields.OnEvent: The event state needed when touching to switch to true the ``State`` value.
fields.OffEvent: The event state needed when touching to switch to false the ``State`` value.
fields.Vibrate: How to vibrate the user's hand when they touch the toggle.
fields.EditModeOnly: Whether this is only available in edit mode.
fields.ActiveUserFilter: how to filter users in the session who can interact with this component depending on the parent user.
fields.__legacyActiveUserRootOnly: Whether to use the legacy active user root. Internal.
